name: Token Security Verification Grimoire
description: Expert procedure for verifying token-related vulnerabilities. Tests for fee-on-transfer issues, rebasing token problems, ERC777 hook attacks, missing return value checks, and approval race conditions.
author: VKG Team
graph_queries: FIND functions WHERE uses_erc20_transfer = true AND NOT token_return_guarded = true
FIND functions WHERE uses_erc20_transfer = true AND NOT uses_safe_erc20 = true

steps.name: Check Token Properties
steps.description: Query VKG for token vulnerability indicators

steps.name: Analyze Balance Handling
steps.description: Check if balance differences are properly handled for fee-on-transfer tokens

steps.name: Check Return Value Handling
steps.description: Verify ERC20 return values are checked

verdict_rules.explanation: ERC20 transfer return values not checked - tokens that return false will silently fail
Code assumes exact transfer amounts - will fail with fee-on-transfer tokens
Approval race condition possible - use increaseAllowance/decreaseAllowance
Uses SafeERC20 and checks balance differences
